name: White Chili#4
recipeIngredient: 1 quart chicken breast meat, poached, skinless - diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3 1/2-quart casserole, combine the drained beans with the chicken broth.
2. In a small saucepan, sauté the garlic and onions in the oil until translucent and soft. Add the chilies and seasonings and mix thoroughly. Add the onion-chili mixture to the beans.
3. Add the diced chicken and cook over low heat for about 5 minutes or until heated through. If needed, add more chicken broth and continue heating.
4. Serve with a compatible mixture of some of the suggested garnishes.
Nutritional information (per serving): 367 calories, 38 gm protein, 39 gm carbohydrates, 6 gm fat, 1 gm saturated fat, 64 mg cholesterol, 275 mg sodium.
